data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"schema_version":2,"epicId":"a154-98de","generatedAt":"2026-04-27T17:06:36Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"PRECONDITIONS degradation channel + sprint story-closure forcing function","description":"Adds structural channel making graceful-degradation fallthroughs visible: every fallthrough writes a PRECONDITIONS event; sprint Step 10a blocks story closure until all degradations are acknowledged; dual-channel ack mechanism (CLI + interactive sprint prompt) provides the exit.","successCriteria":["SC1: PRECONDITIONS schema extended with optional degradation:bool + degradation_type on decisions_log entries; null-coalescing; consumer manifest","SC2: 11 skill files instrumented with bash blocks + EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmarks at all fallthrough sites; per-site smoke validation; marker-consumer manifest","SC3: check-precondition-emit.sh staged-diff keyword detector; EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmark within N=10 lines required; suppression annotation","SC4: Sprint Step 10a unacked-degradation check before OPEN_CHILDREN; story cannot close with unacked degradations; pre-manifest exemption","SC5: Dual-channel ack (CLI + interactive sprint prompt); 3-word-window fuzzy match; >=10 chars; content-referencing; ack-rationale rubric","SC6: Sample-ack --class= for >=4 entries; 3 spot-checks; deterministic stored sampled set; no blanket class ack"]},"researchFindings":[],"stories":[{"id":"e959-9703","title":"Foundation: PRECONDITIONS schema extension, degradation event format, and ack event contract","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, decisions_log schema allows optional degradation:bool and degradation_type:string with null-coalescing","When complete, behavioral test passes against mixed legacy+new fixture","When complete, ack event format FROZEN (decision_ids, if_skipped, timestamp, sampled_set, schema_version)","When complete, consumer manifest at precondition-degradation-consumers.md","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Depends on c183-ed2a for decision_id format","[Testing] Consumer manifest must enumerate sprint validator, harvest-worktree attester, completion-verifier"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1 (schema extension), SC5/SC6 (ack event contract)"},{"id":"3346-0c82","title":"Instrument 11 graceful-degradation prose sites with degradation events","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, fallthrough site inventory document exists and frozen before instrumentation","When complete, all 11 skill files have bash blocks + EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmarks","When complete, one forced fallthrough produces verifiable PRECONDITIONS event","When complete, precondition-marker-consumers.md exists","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Must land AFTER c183-ed2a and 6111-fc7f; rebase required","[Testing] Bash block exercise requires forced-fallthrough test harness"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e959-9703"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC2"},{"id":"f633-06c0","title":"Sprint Step 10a unacknowledged-degradation pre-dispatch check","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, story with unacked degradation cannot be closed; check lists unacked decision_ids","When complete, legacy story with no PRECONDITIONS events trivially passes","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Mock _read_latest_preconditions from orphan branch","[Maintainability] Must use S1 frozen ack event format for pairing logic","[Consumer Impact] Document ordering relative to completion-verifier dispatch"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e959-9703"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC4"},{"id":"ac56-8cf1","title":"SC3 staged-diff keyword-detector pre-commit hook","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, trigger keyword without EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmark within 10 lines fails hook","When complete, suppression annotation bypasses per-line check","When complete, pre-existing lines do not trigger hook","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Requires test fixtures with simulated git diff output","[Reliability] Must land after S2 (3346-0c82) to avoid blocking commits on pre-landmark prose"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e959-9703","3346-0c82"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC3"},{"id":"9039-5aca","title":"Dual-channel ack + sample-ack mechanism","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, CLI preconditions-ack validates --if-skipped with 3-word-window fuzzy match","When complete, interactive sprint prompt presents and accepts ack input","When complete, sample-ack selects 3 via SHA256 seed; stores sampled_set; absorbs remainder only when all 3 pass","When complete, ack-rationale-rubric.md exists","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Edge-case fixture for 3-word-window match; SHA256 seed for determinism","[Reliability] Must use exactly S1-frozen ack event format"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e959-9703","3346-0c82","f633-06c0"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5, SC6"},{"id":"faf5-827f","title":"Update project docs to reflect PRECONDITIONS degradation channel, ack mechanism, and pre-commit hook","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, CLAUDE.md describes degradation channel additions and preconditions-ack CLI","When complete, new config keys documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md"],"considerations":["Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e959-9703","3346-0c82","f633-06c0","ac56-8cf1","9039-5aca"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation accuracy"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":6,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["e959-9703","3346-0c82","f633-06c0","9039-5aca","faf5-827f"]}}
